title: Setback for TVK as Madras HC restrains its one-vote winner MLA from participating in Assembly proceedings
description: The Madras High Court on Tuesday restrained Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) candidate R Seenivasa Sethupathi from participating in legislative proceedings in the Tamil Nadu Assembly after his election from Tiruppattur Assembly Constituency was challenged by Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) leader KR Periakaruppan [KR Periakaruppan v. Chief Election Officer]With today's order, Sethupathi cannot participate in floor tests or other Assembly proceedings for now. DMK's Periakaruppan had lost the electi
